历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 6398, which is the only reference baseline ranking for this university in Sichuan; the 2025 Physics Category enrollment plan is 12 students, and the 2026 plan is 18 students, an expansion of 50%, with a significant expansion rate that notably alleviates the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 19th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (sharing the ranking of Beijing Normal University's main campus), with a stable ranking around 19th in recent years, indicating a very high university level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, and the application attention is at an upper-middle level; Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Geography A+, Chinese History A+, Mathematics A, Statistics A, etc., with as many as 18 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Gaokao is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025 (approximately 463,000), with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 6398, the alleviating effect of a significant 50% expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to an approximately 15.5% increase in the total number of Sichuan candidates, and the high-level brand appeal of the university; considering the pulling effect of the expanded candidate pool and the university's reputation and popularity on applications, after moderate correction, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 8267, with a range of 7767–8767.

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Geography, Psychology, Biological Sciences, Chemistry)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 8267, with a range of 7767–8767. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (7767) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Mathematics majors; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 8000–8500) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 Social Science Experimental Class and Education; candidates near the upper limit of the range (8767) can consider Tier 3 Science Experimental Class as a safety option.
